---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement for Enhancer for Gemini
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., I'm frustrated when...)

## ✨ Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how the new feature should work.

## 🎨 Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered, if applicable.

## 📌 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup designs, or screenshots about the feature request here.
